# Chapter 12: MEMS and microsystems  (~100 pp)
- 12.1 What MEMS are and why scaling matters (12) · 12.2 MEMS fabrication: bulk, surface, LIGA (15) · 12.3 MEMS sensors: accelerometer, gyroscope, pressure, microphone (18) · 12.4 MEMS actuators: comb drives, piezo, electrothermal (12) · 12.5 RF MEMS and BAW/FBAR filters (10) · 12.6 Microfluidics: lab-on-chip, droplet microfluidics, organ-on-chip (15) · 12.7 Optical MEMS: DLP, MEMS mirrors, photonic integration (10) · 12.8 Failure section: stiction, charge-trapping, packaging-induced stress (8)

**Archetype**: scaling, interface, failure. **Project**: characterise a MEMS accelerometer (smartphone IMU); identify its noise floor. **Exercises**: 28.
